bluetooth_confirm.title: Chef iQ Probe Found
bluetooth_confirm.description:
**{name}** is ready to add.

This integration exposes the following sensors:
- 🌡️ Probe tip and zone temperatures (Tip, Zone 1–3)
- 🌡️ Ambient (oven/air) temperature
- 📊 Probe average temperature
- 🔋 Battery level

If you have multiple probes, each will be discovered and added separately. To identify which is which, check the label on your charging case — probes are marked 1 and 2.

You can rename this device any time after adding it via **Settings → Devices & Services → Chef iQ**.

abort.no_devices_found: No Chef iQ probes found nearby. Make sure the probe is active and in range.
